commands.review_summary:
Adds provider conformance tests asserting advertised SSH support configures to `SSHLoginBackend` and advertised `crabbox-sync` configures to `SSHLeaseBackend`, plus fake offline config for Semaphore and Sprites.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a test-hardening PR rather than a bug report with a runtime reproduction path. Source inspection shows current main lacks the two SSH backend-interface checks while adjacent provider conformance tests already exist.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed; this member-authored test-only PR should stay open for ordinary maintainer review and CI completion.

target.title: test(providers): enforce ssh feature contracts
target.body:
## Summary
- add provider conformance coverage for advertised SSH support requiring SSHLoginBackend
- add provider conformance coverage for advertised crabbox-sync support requiring SSHLeaseBackend
- add offline fake config for providers that validate credentials during Configure

## Verification
- go test ./internal/providers/all -run 'TestSSHFeatureRequiresSSHLoginBackend|TestCrabboxSyncFeatureRequiresSSHLeaseBackend|TestDirectTailscaleFeatureRequiresMetadataBackend|TestCleanupFeatureRequiresCleanupBackend|TestPauseResumeFeatureRequiresPausableBackend|TestURLBridgeFeatureRequiresBridgeProvider'
- go test ./internal/providers/all
- go test ./...
- go vet ./...
- git diff --check
target.author: vincentkoc
